hooks.prompt: A new source file was just created. Check if a corresponding test file exists. Contoso standards require: every module must have a test file (e.g., user.service.ts → user.service.test.ts), minimum 80% line coverage, test naming follows 'should_[expected]_when_[condition]' convention. If no test file exists for this module, remind the user to create one and offer to generate it.
